Han Rourou, is the beauty of Huaxiang Street. She is every man's dream girl. Love abounds when these men and women cross paths.

programme.desc: A variety of news and developments of current events from Indonesia and abroad, complemented by the study of leading ustadz from an Islamic point of view on issues that are in the public spotlight.

programme.title: Walau Bukan Jodoh Udah Sambungin Aja
programme.desc: Tari (Rachquel Nesia) heard that her boss’s son was working at her office. Tari thought her boss’s son was Langit (Alex Rio), not Gala (Kevin Hillers), because there was no way her boss would have his son work as an office boy.

programme.title: Getuk Dangdut Pembawa Asmara Gak Rugi Doong
programme.desc: Kiara (Ciara Brosnan) ran away from home because she was angry and embarrassed to have an aunt, Ghita (Shanice Margaretha), who sells getuk. While Ghita was searching for Kiara, she was helped by Yudi (Rizky Fachrel), a handsome teacher at Kiara’s school.

programme.title: SALON PET - EP 17
programme.desc: A semi-documentary about the animals.

programme.title: AMAZING STAYCATION - EP 14
programme.desc: A semi-documentary about the ongoing trend nowadays during the covid 19 situation, which is staycation and the variety of the activities.

programme.title: TERCYDUK - EP 75
programme.desc: This reality show investigates the root causes of various dramatic and emotionally draining personal and social cases. Then find a way out to help the parties who are victims

programme.title: POP ACADEMY - EP 7
programme.desc: The biggest POP music talent search event in Indonesia! Looking for young Indonesian talents with golden voices in Pop music who are ready to become stars.

programme.title: Istilah Kata Mah Saling Cosplay Jadi Pacar Aja
programme.desc: Constantly pressured by his parents, Arya (EL RYAN CARLEN) decides to take the plunge and confess his feelings to Diana, but it turns out Diana is picked up by her boyfriend instead. Arya is heartbroken. He finally decides to pretend he has a girlfriend.

programme.title: Dunia Tipu Tipu, Ujungnya Tetep I Lop U
programme.desc: It’s said that Acha and Daffa’s pre-wedding photoshoot suddenly fell through because Daffa was already seeing another girl. Later, on her younger sister’s advice, Acha decided to go ahead with the pre-wedding photoshoot with another man named Mamat. Mamat got a makeover to look like a Westerner.

programme.title: POP ACADEMY - EP 7
programme.desc: The biggest POP music talent search event in Indonesia! Looking for young Indonesian talents with golden voices in Pop music who are ready to become stars.

programme.title: ILHAMI - EP 15
programme.desc: A variety of news and developments of current events from Indonesia and abroad, complemented by the study of leading ustadz from an Islamic point of view on issues that are in the public spotlight.

programme.title: TAKDIR - EP 27
programme.desc: Takdir is a program which is discussing about disaster, problems, and destiny in human life with different kind of situations in real life.

programme.title: TABRAK CINTAKU DI JALAN, JANGAN DI PERASAAN
programme.desc: Maira was assigned to be the tour guide for a boss from Singapore. Dimas was initially hostile toward her, but since he was a new employee, he had to learn a lot from Maira in order to become a tour guide.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 5
programme.desc: Dafri has just returned to Indonesia to meet Alina and get engaged. However, the engagement is hindered because Nadia disapproves of Dafri’s relationship with her daughter, Alina. Nadia deliberately sent Dafri to study in Turkey to keep him away from her daughter. In addition, Dafri’s father asked him to marry Syifa, a woman he had just met for the first time. At that time, Syifa’s wedding fell through because her fiancé, Ilham, suddenly disappeared. After marrying Dafri, Syifa moved with her hu

programme.title: Tukar Nasib Kok Jadi Makin Asik
programme.desc: Nila and Fira are sisters. Nila and Fira have very different personalities. Nila is a beautiful, fashionable girl, and she’s very popular with the boys at her school. Fira, on the other hand, has a simple, unassuming appearance. However, Fira is a chef at a restaurant.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 61
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 207
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple living happily and simply in Magelang. They have a daughter, Zahra. Fathir works as a small-scale contractor. Meanwhile, Sukma is simply a homemaker. One day, Fathir lands a major project. Unfortunately, the project runs into trouble. Their problems multiply when their daughter, Zahra, is diagnosed with a serious illness. The doctor recommends that Zahra undergo treatment in Jakarta. Fathir, Sukma, Zahra, and Ira—Sukma’s adoptive mother—moved to Jakarta. W

programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.desc: Koleksi komedi terbaik MLM Terbaik 2014.

programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan pencarian pelawak ‘standup’ paling hebat di Malaysia dan siapakah yang bakal digelar juara musim pertama Gelak Gempak serta membawa pulang wang ganjaran bernilai RM25,000.

programme.title: Jejak Jepun - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah program travelog untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: 3 dara kg.com - EP 12
programme.desc: 3 Dara nak buat bisnes produk kecantikan sendiri menggunakan modal pinjaman dari Tabung JKK Kampung Kembang Kempis. Mereka ditipu oleh Kulup Q , di mana duit dah dibayar tetapi barang tak dapat.

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged - EP 4
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Dapur Chef Ammar - EP 8
programme.desc: Saksikan kehebatan dan kepakaran Chef Ammar dalam menyediakan pelbagai hidangan masakan dan makanan ala Arab yang lazat lagi penuh berkhasiat ini.

programme.title: Spontan Boboi & Kengkawan - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan Spontan kanak-kanak yang di hoskan oleh Afdlin Shauki bersama artist and pelawak jemputan

programme.title: Mr. Grey - EP 4

programme.title: Pingouin Et Goeland Et Leurs 500 Petits
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary couple. Daughter of deportees, the mother of director Michel Leclerc is taken in at the Sevres children's home in Hauts-de-Seine, an institution run by Roger and Yvonne Hagnauer, a couple of anti-Nazi pacifists whom everyone nicknamed ''Penguin'' and ''Seagull''.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 5
programme.desc: Julianne, who has trouble dealing with her childhood memories, finds it difficult to accept that her mother was always showed more affection to her son than to her.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 6
programme.desc: Remi has to accept the consequences of his acts and the fact that only time can heal the pain he'd known in the past.

programme.title: Serieux ? - EP 4
programme.desc: Marie-eve and Mathieu have a big sort out and decide to organise a rally to avoid the contents of their dustbins ending up as land-fill. Centres to deposit your waste, to sort it for recycling and for recycling electronic waste...

programme.title: Chroniques D'en Haut
programme.desc: A magazine programme devoted to the mountains. An opportunity to explore a rich and fascinating world and take a sumptuous journey through the heart of the most beautiful landscapes of the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: La Belle Vie - EP 1
programme.desc: Julien sets off to visit Jean-Luc Kanape living in the land of his ancestors, where he has built a small off-grid cabin. Guardian of this territory of the caribou, he shares with Julien his love of the forest and of handing down the ancestral knowledge of the Innu.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres Normandes - EP 10
programme.desc: In Seine-Maritime, David Gallienne explores asparagus farming. With chef Melanie, they prepare a green asparagus and hazelnut tartare, topped with a white asparagus veloute and a poached egg.

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 26
programme.desc: Along with event curator Alexandre Samson, we look back at the ''1997 Fashion Big Bang'' exhibition at Paris's Musee Galliera. Discover the history of the lucky ladybird. Spotlight on candlemaking: the former royal manufactory, the house of Trudon celebrates its 380th anniversary. How should you wear a cape?

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Cash - EP 7
programme.desc: Today, Garance is in Bienne, a bilingual town close to the German-speaking part of Switzerland. Who will have a chance to win 1,000 francs?

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: La Belle Vie - EP 1
programme.desc: Julien sets off to visit Jean-Luc Kanape living in the land of his ancestors, where he has built a small off-grid cabin. Guardian of this territory of the caribou, he shares with Julien his love of the forest and of handing down the ancestral knowledge of the Innu.

programme.title: Chroniques D'en Haut
programme.desc: A magazine programme devoted to the mountains. An opportunity to explore a rich and fascinating world and take a sumptuous journey through the heart of the most beautiful landscapes of the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus - EP 6
programme.desc: Four little dinosaurs, Rocky, Bill, Tiny and Mazu, discover a dangerous world where the mysterious Gigantosaurus, the most ferocious of all the dinosaurs, is forever on the prowl. The four best friends set their heading for adventure, confronting their fears and working together to solve all their problems.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 67
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 68

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux - EP 15
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux - EP 16
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques - EP 12
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous ! - EP 12
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo - EP 12
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode - EP 10
programme.desc: Since the early 1990s, XULY.Bet has designed clothes that combine comfort and style with a commitment to sustainability. The fashion designer Lamine Badian Kouyate describes his work as he presents his spring-summer 2024 runway show.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Pour Le Maillot Jaune...
programme.desc: The romantic relationship between a sports journalist and a cyclist during the 1939 Tour de France.

programme.title: La Premiere Marche
programme.desc: When Victoire, a young trans judoka, reaches the final of a regional competition, her opponent, Sonia, refuses to compete against her.

programme.title: Temps De Chien
programme.desc: The end of the pandemic put an end to Alice's side job, writing funeral orations, and her novel's publication is canceled. To help her out of this very bad patch, her fortune teller suggests writing horoscopes for cats and dogs.

programme.title: Opj - EP 1
programme.desc: Founder of an association helping troubled youth, Adele Meyer appears to be a generous and sincere woman. Yet she becomes the target of several assassination attempts. Commander Clarissa Hoarau is assigned to the case.

programme.title: Opj - EP 2
programme.desc: During her investigation, Commander Clarissa Hoarau makes strange discoveries. Adele Meyer's husband hides a delinquent past, and their neighbor turns out to be Captain Nico Storelli, the brigade's newest recruit.

programme.title: Le Village Des Endormis
programme.desc: As a murderer, Lucas, manages to escape during a prison transfer, a strange phenomenon turns life upside down in a village: one after another the locals fall into a long sleep. Martin, police captain on the verge of divorce, has to find Lucas amidst an overwhelming climate of collective panic.

programme.title: Secrets Des Profondeurs - EP 7
programme.desc: Sam and Mario head to Lake Ontario to try to discover the identity of an unnamed wreck that could well be the remains of a British warship dating from the war of 1812.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. programme.title: L'invite

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf

programme.title: Le Grand Cactus - EP 1
programme.desc: Contents: Donald Trump, Elon Musk and Brigitte Macron; an investigation into the world of bailiffs; doctor in mathematics, physicist, professor at ULB, author of scientific riddles, social media darling, Fabrizio Bucella is the special guest.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 14
programme.desc: A journalist, author and podcaster, Nawal was born in Tunis. Of Amazigh origin, she was raised by a Franco-Algerian couple in the Paris region. Drawing on her lived experience and investigations, she deconstructs negrophobia and unspoken racial issues within North African diasporas, notably in her podcast ''Is That a Thing Among Us?''

programme.title: Le Duplex
programme.desc: On the sixth floor of a Paris apartment block, the Berger family are dreaming of converting their flat into a duplex by buying the neighbours' flat below. Except that these neighbours are very happy in their home. The only solution: sow discord to force them to sell. But sometimes you are hoisted with your own petard.

programme.title: ENTR
programme.desc: For more than 40 days, thousands of people have been taking to the streets in Tirana, Albania — the biggest protests the country has seen in recent history. Since the end of May, people have been protesting against corruption, demanding political change and fighting for Albania's future. Gen Z is leading the movement, and many are now calling it a revolution.

programme.title: The Dip
programme.desc: DW speaks with former EU trade commissioner Cecilia Malmström and consultant Cristina Caffarra about whether Europe’s rulebook is protecting citizens or holding back growth. At stake is whether Europe can compete with the United States and China without giving up the values that define its economic model.

programme.title: Movie - Pattas
programme.desc: A young man is separated from his mother at an early age and becomes a petty thief. However, he soon realises his past and decides to learn an ancient form of martial arts to defeat an old foe.

programme.title: Movie - Alli Arjuna
programme.desc: Arivu lives with his friends in an old bungalow whose owner is fondly known as 'Daddy' and runs an eatery. Soon, Savitri enters his life after he offers to help her when her groom disappears.

programme.title: Movie - Pillaiyar Theru Kadasi Veedu
programme.desc: Ganesan loves Sandhya, but fatefully his marriage is arranged with Valli, his uncle's daughter. When he learns that Sandhya is terminally ill, he marries her and earns the wrath of his family.

programme.title: Movie - Singara Chittu
programme.desc: Murali marries Raji against the wishes of his mother. Worsening conditions force him to move out with his wife and kid. All plans to begin life anew come to a halt due to an unexpected turn of events.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Looty
programme.desc: Childless couple Rasappa and Geetha adopt a child abandoned in their car. However, problems ensue when Geetha suspects her husband to be the biological father of the child.

programme.title: Movie - Sri Raja Rajeshwari
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Rajasthan
programme.desc: When terrorists infiltrate the Indian shores to attack the nuclear scientists, the government forms a special task force, which includes top policemen.

programme.title: Movie - Unakkagave Vazhukkiren
programme.desc: Ravi Shankar stops composing music after a tragedy occurs in his life. He meets Chitra who shares similar interests. Soon, he learns about her misery and realises he is responsible for it.

programme.title: Movie - Aanandham
programme.desc: Tirupathi, the eldest son in the family, works hard to raise his three brothers Madhavan, Kannan, and Surya. However, problems arise in the family when Madhavan's wife begins to rebel against him.

programme.title: Movie - Thaaikulamae Thaaikulamae
programme.desc: While on a business tour, circumstances force a married man to marry another woman. However, his first wife happens to learn about his second marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Aayiram Nilave Vaa
programme.desc: Twins Chander and Suri fall in love with the same girl. However, things take a turn when Chander accidentally kills Suri.

programme.title: Movie - Paattali Magan
programme.desc: Gopi, a poor farmer, falls in love and gets married to Radha, a rich landlord's daughter. However Radha's stepmother, a cunning lady, plans to destroy the marriage by getting Gopi in trouble.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Thenkasi Pattinam
programme.desc: Kannan is in love with his childhood friend Meenakshi, but keeps it a secret from his beloved friend Das. However, the friendship between them is ruined as Das falls in love with the same girl.

programme.title: Movie - Pudhu Nilavu
programme.desc: Madan breaks his friendship with Anand because the latter likes the same girl as he does. However, Madan is extremely shocked when he makes a discovery about Anand.

programme.title: Movie - Vetri Vizha
programme.desc: After a fatal accident, a man suffers from amnesia. However, when flashes from his past help him discover his combat skills, he sets out on a mission to find his true identity.

programme.title: Movie - Jore
programme.desc: A righteous young man takes it upon himself the task of putting straight a powerful but corrupt politician in a village, who also happens to be the father of his love interest.

programme.title: Movie - Raajiyam
programme.desc: Karthikeyan runs a secret agency. When he proves that the governor's son had killed his own wife, the leader gets angry and decides to seek revenge.

programme.title: WTA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Upper Austria Ladies Linz is a professional women's tennis tournament in the WTA Tour, first held in 1987. It is held at the Design Center Linz in Austria, featuring top-ranked players on indoor surfaces.

programme.title: PGA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The ISCO Championship is an official FedExCup event on the PGA TOUR schedule. The 2025 tournament will take place at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville, Kentucky. The golf course encompasses 243 acres and was originally designed by Chick Adam It debuted in 2015 as the Barbasol Championship. Like other alternate events, the winner of the tournament does not earn an invitation to the Masters. However, the winner still receives a 2 year PGA Tour exemption and a trip to the PGA Championship.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 10
programme.desc: Patrick Vieira revisits the defining moments of his legendary Premier League career, counting down the 10 greatest memories from his time in England. From fierce rivalries and title triumphs to unforgettable performances in midfield, Vieira reflects on the moments that shaped his legacy as one of the Premier League's all-time greats.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. Now coaching at Chelmsford City, we see a different side to the former hardman as he passes on his experience to the next generation, while reflecting on the moment

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history. Through iconic matches and unforgettable characters, we capture what this

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 25 MAY
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 38, as the Premier League season reaches its dramatic conclusion. Manchester City host Aston Villa, Liverpool take on Brentford, Arsenal travel to Crystal Palace, and Manchester United face Brighton on the final day.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 7
programme.desc: We take a trip down memory lane to revisit the incredible story of Norwich City's unforgettable 1992-93 season; the campaign that saw an unfancied side come within touching distance of becoming the first-ever Premier League champions. Through interviews with the players and staff who lived it, we relive the pressure, drama and defining moments of a nerve-shredding title battle with Manchester United that could have changed English football history forever.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6
programme.desc: We spend the day with Dean Ashton as he reflects on a career that promised so much and was cut short far too soon. From his rise through the Football League to becoming one of the Premier League's most exciting forwards with West Ham United, Ashton looks back on the goals, injuries and moments that shaped his journey in the game. Now working as a respected pundit, we see how his passion and understanding of football continue to drive him long after retirement.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 10
programme.desc: Patrick Vieira revisits the defining moments of his legendary Premier League career, counting down the 10 greatest memories from his time in England. From fierce rivalries and title triumphs to unforgettable performances in midfield, Vieira reflects on the moments that shaped his legacy as one of the Premier League's all-time greats.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 18
programme.desc: Ray Parlour spent 15 years with the Gunners, winning three Premier League titles during that time. His third was perhaps the most memorable of them all. The "Romford Pele" looks back at the 2003/04 campaign, the season of the Invincibles.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 2
programme.desc: Tim Howard spent a decade as Everton's first choice goalkeeper, the club that defined his Premier League career. The American recalls his journey from New Jersey, via Old Trafford, to Goodison Park, and his most memorable moments between the posts.

programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Dan Evensen fights Jeremiah 'Hacksaw' Constant. Constant is a game opponent and looks to make his mark against Evenson in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (33-0, 24 KOs) defending his WBO welterweight title against the dangerous Carlos 'El Indio' Quintana (24-1, 19 KOs). The February 9, 2008 fight, at the Pechanga Resort & Casino in Temecula, California, USA, was a bloody brawl that ends with a suprising unanimous decisio

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Miguel Rodriguez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated Andre Berto (21-0, 18 KOs) battling Miguel Angel Rodriguez, aka 'Miki', (29-2, 23 KOs)i for the vacant WBC Welterweight Title from the FedEx Forum in Memphis, Tennessee, USA on June 21, 2008. Bonus coverage includes Chris 'The Nightmare' Arreola (23-0, 21 KOs) vs. Chazz Witherspoon (23-0, 15 KOs).

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Weapons as well as Girl's Forms and Team Demo highlights.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs Orlando Lora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman facing off with Orlando Lora. A left hook and right uppercut combination ends this fight. Also on the card, action from former heavyweight champion James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 5, from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan, features Terunofuji, Meisei, Takakeisho and Asanoyama.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: Highlights from the 26th Karate Senior World Championships as top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, all converged on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode is highlighted by a heartfelt interview with the legendary MMA Hall of Famer Tito Ortiz that shows you sides of the former champ you never knew from his childhood to his love of fishing to the man he is today. We stop by "Cowboy" Donald Cerrone's ranch to see you don't need the flashiest training equipment to be a world class fighter. Plus Nate Marquardt gets his dream car and UFC ring girls bring us on a tour of a new gym.

programme.title: FS MMA Dan Evensen vs. Jeremiah Constant
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Dan Evensen fights Jeremiah 'Hacksaw' Constant. Constant is a game opponent and looks to make his mark against Evenson in Costa Rica.

This episode features The Ring Magazine's 2011 Fight of The Year from the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA. Undefeated welterweight world champion Andre Berto (27-0, 21 KOs) puts his title on the line against 'Vicious' Victor Ortiz (28-2, 22 KOs) in a fight that restores your passion in the sport of boxing. Berto

programme.title: Greatest Classics Mike Tyson vs. Sammy Scaff
programme.desc: The talk of the boxing world takes center stage as a young Mike Tyson displays the lethal combination of speed and power that would later make him a World Champion. Tyson enters the Felt Forum in New York City with a 13-0 record, having knocked out every opponent he's faced thus far, with 9 of those knockouts coming in the first round. programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Judo Grand Prix from Antalya, speak with Lukas Krpalek about his move to +100 kg weight class, and get a demonstration on how to preform the popular ride and roll counter attack.

programme.desc: This episode features a heavyweight title bout featuring Chris Arreola and mulitple-division world champion Tomasz Adamek, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Ryan Rhodes
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Saul (Canelo) Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, taking on challenger Ryan Rhodes. The bout ends in the final round after a series of unanswered blows. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Finals: Norway vs England - EP 99
programme.desc: England faces tournament surprise Norway in a thrilling 2026 World Cup Quarter-Final in Miami. This high-stakes clash features an elite goalscoring battle between Harry Kane and Erling Haaland as both nations fight for a coveted semi-final spot.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Final: Argentina v Switzerland - EP 100
programme.desc: Argentina will look to their attacking flair and big-match experience as they chase back-to-back World Cup titles, while Switzerland's disciplined defence and composure under pressure make them dangerous opponents capable of frustrating any side.

programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 16

programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 5

When the weather turns, Glitch and the Go Jetters find themselves in trouble. Can they get to safety before a huge tornado hits the island?

programme.desc: Duggee has a job to do outside of the Clubhouse. But who will look after the Squirrels? King Tiger of course, he has his Babysitting Badge. But then the Squirrels end up babysitting King Tiger!

programme.desc: The Squirrels are inspired to learn how to sing a cappella style after hearing a famous bird quartet singing in a nearby tree.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: After Glitch accidentally destroys part of the Academy, he and Ubercorn have a huge argument. When he heads to Grim HQ to make amends, Ubercorn is accidentally trapped as Glitch heads to the most remote place on earth: Point Nemo, in the middle of the Pacific Ocean. With the help of some friendly astronauts, Glitch and Ubercorn try to get a message to the Go Jetters before Grim HQ sinks to the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 42
programme.desc: While clearing up the Academy farm after a heavy storm, the Go Jetters wish they could keep the plants above water. Glitch remembers a place where the farmers do just that - Bangladesh, where many farmers grow their crops on wooden platforms to avoid floods in the monsoon season. Glitch, Tala, Lars and Foz head to Bangladesh to see these floating farms, but after the Grimbots accidentally knock the Grimmer into a raft, Tala and a local farmer are swept into a nearby river! Glitch and the Go Jett

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: It's lunchtime on Bluey's deck! But the BBQ needs a salad, so Bingo's relaxing sit-down will have to wait until she finds every colour of capsicum her cousins asked for!

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 9
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.desc: Bingo finds a toy turtle at the playground and wants to take him home, but Dad says it's not the right thing to do.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 12
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Chihuahua, Northern Mexico to discover how a colony of black tailed prairie dogs protect their pups from prowling bull snakes, hawks and coyotes as the pups take their critical first steps above ground.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 34
programme.desc: Duggee is reading the Squirrels one of his favourite comics. They eagerly want to know the ending, but the comic was discontinued. Luckily Duggee has the comic badge, he can show the Squirrels how to create their own ending.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 33
programme.desc: Duggee has a job to do outside of the Clubhouse. But who will look after the Squirrels? King Tiger of course, he has his Babysitting Badge. But then the Squirrels end up babysitting King Tiger!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 31
programme.desc: The Squirrels are inspired to learn how to sing a cappella style after hearing a famous bird quartet singing in a nearby tree.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 44
programme.desc: Glitch has taken Tala on holiday to Slovenia's Postojna Caves, and she is looking forward to finding a rare creature called an olm for her class project. Ubercorn and Lars join them.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 43
programme.desc: After Glitch accidentally destroys part of the Academy, he and Ubercorn have a huge argument. When he heads to Grim HQ to make amends, Ubercorn is accidentally trapped as Glitch heads to the most remote place on earth: Point Nemo, in the middle of the Pacific Ocean. With the help of some friendly astronauts, Glitch and Ubercorn try to get a message to the Go Jetters before Grim HQ sinks to the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 11
programme.desc: Sonny returns to Sodor to try to be a really useful engine again but some of the other trains aren't willing to give him a second chance.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S02 - EP 3
programme.desc: A search for shade on a hot day leads Sarah and Duck to discover a fascinating tower in the park.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S02 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Sarah hears some interesting music on the radio, she and Duck try to recreate it.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: Stanley goes to help Myrtle, who has found a paint smudge on the Town Hall's door!

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: The cicrus bus has broken down, but the children are waiting for a circus show! Can Stanley help out?

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: From astronauts to acrobats, the animals talk about all the things they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 22
programme.desc: When JoJo is interested in all the beautiful fish that Gran Gran shows her on the tablet, Gran Gran has a plan. They can visit all the fish and sea creatures at the aquarium! Whilst there, JoJo is amazed by the fish and sea creatures. To top off their fun-filled day out, JoJo meets a special friend of Gran Gran's.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 13
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 10
programme.desc: The Squirrels are out doing their exercises when suddenly, a cheetah called Chipo comes along with his dance crew. He criticises them for not being able to dance in time, and it turns out Duggee used to be part of the dance crew! Duggee was a great dancer, but he never stuck to the choreography and was always making up his own moves.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 9
programme.desc: The Squirrels are having fun playing games but are surprised to find out that Betty didn't always enjoy playing. Since her first day at Squirrel Club, she always impressed everyone with her confidence and independence, but at first she didn't know how to join in with the others. Luckily, Duggee had a great idea to bring all the Squirrels together.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch has stolen the Golden Gate Bridge fog horns, meaning trouble! Can the Go Jetters save the large cargo ship from crashing into the bridge?

programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's fitness guru, Garlic, with a set of fun exercises to make you stronger.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 33
programme.desc: The Veggies are delighted with a new tablet they've found. When they're not looking, Evil Pea turns the tablet to evil mode. Soon the tablet takes over the supermarket.

programme.desc: The Stinkwell skunks help the duo find a beetle couple's dung ball. // Nature ranger Wally Bunker joins Sam and Kit in the jungle to look for a pet frog.

programme.title: The Creature Cases S1 - EP 110
programme.desc: A silver ant needs help getting back home after being swept up by a sandstorm.

programme.title: Deer Squad S4 - EP 402
programme.desc: Kai invents a Bunzooka to send Bobbi's buns into space, but they end up damaging the Dinobird! // Kai and Professor Scratch's upgrades to a Robo-Rose create a stinky cloud over the city!

programme.title: Peppa Pig S6 - EP 623
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has put up a tent in his garden. Peppa and her friends decide it's a perfect place to put on a circus. With Peppa as the ringmaster, the show can begin!

programme.title: Peppa Pig S6 - EP 624
programme.desc: Daddy Pig takes Peppa and George to see a fish pond he used to visit when he was a little piggy. He is a little surprised to learn that a few things have changed since then.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S6 - EP 625
programme.desc: Mummy Pig shows Peppa and her friend Suzy Sheep old photographs from when they were babies. Peppa and Suzy don't remember being that young but are pleased to see that they've always been best friends.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S6 - EP 626
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are on Snowy Mountain learning how to ski. Their teacher, Madame Gazelle is very good at skiing and was once a world champion! But in the end it is Mummy Pig who impresses everyone...

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom S1 - EP 121
programme.desc: King Thistle is confused when his magic bird-spotting book fails to identify a new creature that has made a nest in the castle. // Nanny Plum conjures up a hamster called Pippin for the twins, but the naughty new pet causes chaos in the castle.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S7 - EP 726
programme.desc: Shortly after listening to the story of Thundermouth, the pups are on a mission to save elephants spooked by a scary noise. // Mayor Goodway is left in charge of a class pet, but the hamster escapes! Now it's up to the Paw Patrol to save the pet.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S10 - EP 1012
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's birthday party goes horribly awry when Marshall Kitty gets trapped inside a life-sized pinata.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 126
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose's favorite tree might be off limits for climbing unless Rubble and Grandpa can come up with a solution. / The Crew build a feeder for Farmer Zoe's chickens, but when they get loose, it's up to the pups to safely rescue them.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 103
programme.desc: When a windy day derails construction on an ice cream shop, Rubble, Mix, Wheeler, and Charger are on the chase.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile S1 - EP 108
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 111
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 45
programme.desc: The Trollhunters are paused from action when their parents stage an intervention to get answers from the kids.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 46
programme.desc: The Trollhunters race to stop Gunmar from acquiring a powerful relic, and Jim must do the unthinkable to stop him!

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: When Colonel Kubritz issues a medical quarantine that locks down the high school, Aja and Krel must avoid capture with help from their friends. Meanwhile Vex, Zadra, and Stuart have a run-in with a familiar face.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Stuart’s larger-than-life ex-girlfriend surprises him with a visit, Aja, Steve, Vex, and Nana join them on a triple date— where issues from each of their relationships come to a head. Meanwhile, Krel, Toby, and Eli discover a new passion: Sci-Fi filmmaking.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: It’s Game Show Day in the dollhouse! Our wily and well-groomed host, CatRat, leads Gabby and Pandy around the dollhouse, where they compete in Gab-ified games, like Tushy Tunes on the “butt xylophone” couch and a cooking competition of Bakey with Cakey. They win tickets and trade them in for prizes at the end.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a pirate treasure map in the shape of the dollhouse (a piece of it has been torn off). This must mean it’s time for a pirate treasure hunt in the dollhouse! Pirate Gabby and Pirate Pandy head out on their journey across the many “lands” of the dollhouse to find the Gabby Cats Treasure!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes beakers filled with a magical potion, they conjure up an invite for Spa Day at the dollhouse! However, while decorating for MerCat's favorite day of the year, MerCat accidentally loses her color and sparkle. Gabby and Pandy must help her get her sparkle back for the big Spa Day party!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: The annual baby pageant approaches, but Staci’s plan to win may have a negative effect

programme.title: Casper's Scare School S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: Power Outage – Part 3: Escape from Scare School Things worsen when a leprechaun, Razznik, steals the magical cleptor that now holds all of Scare School's powers. Power Outage – Part 4: The Final Battle On a hunt for ghostly powers, the evil leprechaun orders Deedstown to hand over Casper's uncles, OR ELSE.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: Ghost in the Gallery After hearing reports of a ghost stealing artwork from the Deedstown Museum, Casper becomes convinced that his uncles are involved. Wart on the Nose When Professor Thurdigree Burns comes down with dragon flu, Casper, Mantha and Ra are tasked with finding a cure.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Pete the Polar Bear shows up for a vacation on MerCat’s sunny beach. Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats show Pete he can have a great vacation, even if things don’t go precisely to plan.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Marcus brings home the class tree sapling for the weekend, the Dew Drops see it starting to wilt and must cheer the sapling up, so Marcus can make sure to plant it for his class. / When Athena accidentally breaks Lola's nature sculpture, the Dew Drops must go on a scavenger hunt to replace the missing pieces.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Lola, Dylan and Cassie have tickets to the carnival, but when Dylan loses his ticket, the Dew Drops set out to find it. / When Phoebe accidentally gets tossed into Nicholas' diaper bag before a trip to the park, Phoebe has to help a baby bird, while Eden and Athena must help Marcus rehearse for his big concert.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: With a little help from Gabby’s imagination, a sparkly toy banana turns into a magical Rainy Day Banana that helps Gabby and the Gabby Cats have fun on a rainy day! They have silly banana snacks with Cakey, make crafts to tell a story with Baby Box, and have an a-meow-zing banana dance party with DJ Catnip. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: The dollhouse is immersed in imaginative Wild West play with Sheriff Gabby, Sheriff Pandy, and CatRat the Bandit. Sheriff Gabby and Sheriff Pandy must safely deliver gold to the bank, but it gets confiscated by Bandit CatRat! They go on an adventure to get the gold back and restore order in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: When their favorite zoo visitor loses his teddy bear, our gang goes on a wild adventure through New York City to return it to him - and in the process Marty learns that some things in life can't be found in an instruction manual.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he’s faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: The kids scare away a swarm of bees. But when they realize bees make the flowers happy, they hatch a plan to get them back! / When Scallop makes a bad choice, Kelp helps her learn from her mistakes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Kelp and the rest of his friends put on a game of rainbow ball, but Kelp begins to wonder how well his special spark can help him truly measure up to his favorite player. / When the underwater friends meet someone new, they’re reminded that their differences make them unique.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Tag discovers that Scooch is a great baker, she encourages him to start a pupcake stand. But when Tag rounds up more customers than Scooch is prepared to handle, Scooch can’t keep up with the demand. \ Tag and Scooch’s race to pick up the most trash on Pawston Beach is thwarted by Frank and Beans, who just want to make more of a mess.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. \ If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: After Burple and Cutter crash-land in a village of tiny dragons, Burple's unintentional act of courage leads the locals to crown him as their king.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 24

But Krupp enlists Mr. Neamer (bizarro Meaner), who then super-enlargers his brain and becomes Brainy Blabulous, in order to stop the subversion of authority.

programme.desc: Team Trollhunter discovers a surprising ally while trapped in a flooding tavern!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 49
programme.desc: As the countdown to the Eternal Night approaches, Jim is enlightened in the truth about himself.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: When General Morando and Colonel Kubritz attack the Mothership, Team Tarron must fight to protect the King and Queen’s Cores and their lives… with shocking, fatal results.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: Aja and Krel travel into their parents’ memories in pursuit of Morando – and the truth about Gaylen’s Core. But when the King and Queen’s lives are jeopardized, a trusted ally makes a sacrifice that will change the team forever.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up. But after the storm clears, Tony challenges the brothers to a camel race in order to get their help tracking down Cleve

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela. Just when it looks like our guys have the upperhand, Cleve shows them he has one last t

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded – is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Boss Baby struggles to take a sick day even though a mysterious baby cry is wreaking havoc on the neighborhood baby-love

programme.desc: Revenge of the Creature Catcher Casper, Mantha and Ra accidentally lead Jimmy's father to the underworld.Slugby. To prove that the teachers haven't gone soft, Alder and Dash stage a Slugby match.

programme.desc: You Oughta Be in Pictures When Mantha sees a Deedstown mob attacking a group of fellow zombies, she's determined to lead them in a counterattack. Crypt Critters Mantha comes down with an embarrassing case of crypt critters, but refuses to go to the nurse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Kitty Ranger Team Leader Mama Box helps Kitty Ranger Gabby and Pandy get a lost Baby Me-Owl back home to its Mama in the Fairy Tale Garden. They embark on a hiking adventure! They learn about animal tracking, earn patches along the way, and ultimately, reunite Baby with Mama!

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: When Harper unknowingly drops her cooking camp application on the way to post office, it’s up to the Dew Drops to get it into that big blue mailbox. / When Cassie accidentally places Lola's beloved, old toy wand in a box marked for a giveaway drive in the park, the Dew Drops must find a way to retrieve the wand before it ends up in the hands of an entirely new family.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Marcus has a piano recital and unknowingly forgets his lucky penny at home. Now it’s up to the Dew Drops to get the penny across town and back into Marcus’ pocket before showtime. / When Nicholas rolls the hamster ball (with Hammy inside) out into the streets, the Dew Drops must get Hammy back home safely.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 24
programme.desc: Gabby brings DJ Catnip a microphone for him to use in the big music show, but he has some terrible news: he lost his groove! Determined to help him get his groove back, Gabby and Pandy take him on a musical search through the dollhouse. As they go, Gabby uses the microphone to record sounds from the Gabby Cats’ everyday activities that culminate into a new song that gets DJ his groove back just in time for the show! In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Gabby sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a recipe for dandelion soup and a soup bowl, she discovers Kitty Fairy is sick! Gabby and Pandy make her some delicious dandelion soup and while she rests, they take care of her Garden. With the help of all the Gabby Cats, they water the Singing Flowers, help the Rainbow Kitty Bushes regain their color, and sing some fussy Itty Bitty Blossoms a lullaby. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When the happy-go-lucky sea lions draw crowds away from his show, Alex decides that he needs to act like the Sea Lions. When Alex’s attempts to compete with them don’t bring back the crowds, he learns to be true to himself rather than try to be someone he's not (i.e. fish gotta swim, birds gotta fly, and lions gotta roar... and do backflips on land).

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Gloria sneaks into the NY Ballet to audition for “Swan Lake” and gets rejected (not for her dancing, but because she’s a hippo), Gloria’s belief in herself is tested.

programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!

programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it “the Kelp way.”

programme.desc: It’s Pawston’s annual Take Your Kid to Work Day, and it’s Tag’s year to spend the day at the Doorbell Store with Paw. \ Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to complete an obstacle course in the woods.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Scooch is bummed out because he’s missing his favorite holiday back in his old farm town, so Tag wants to cheer him up by rounding up some chickens and bringing Clucky Day to Pawston. \ When there’s a schedule mix-up and the Pawston Get Sox players think they have a day off, it’s up to Tag and Scooch to round up all five players in time for the fetch game, so that they don’t have to forfeit.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 3

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 17
programme.desc: The Pacific campaign reaches a brutal and bloody fever pitch from 1944 to 1945.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 18
programme.desc: The war in Europe reaches a climax as Allied armies advance towards Berlin, and Hitler orders his people to fight to the last man.

programme.title: Special Forces (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: From a Tarzan assault course towering 10m above ground to a 160km forced march, recruits of Malaysian Army Special Forces unit, Grup Gerak Khas, are pushed to their limits to earn the coveted Green Beret.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: The team zeroes in on the island of Bermuda—namesake of the Triangle—and one of the most infamous mysteries that helped establish the dark reputation of these waters.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14) - EP 10
programme.desc: Pickle teams up with Jacob, and it's almost like being on vacation. Zak tries to make up for a crucial mistake. Bruce ventures into uncharted territory. Ashley sets her sights on monstrous land gators.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: From ancient religious texts buried in Egypt to cultural relics found at sea, or even a tower of skulls hiding under the earth—these lost artefacts change what we thought we knew about certain beliefs.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 18
programme.desc: The war in Europe reaches a climax as Allied armies advance towards Berlin, and Hitler orders his people to fight to the last man.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: The team zeroes in on the island of Bermuda—namesake of the Triangle—and one of the most infamous mysteries that helped establish the dark reputation of these waters.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5) - EP 3
programme.desc: Most people know it as the biblical birthplace of man. But is the Garden of Eden really just a story to explain creation? Or could it be a real place? And if it did exist—where exactly was it?

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks - EP 17
programme.desc: The Pacific campaign reaches a brutal and bloody fever pitch from 1944 to 1945.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: One of China's oldest provinces with history that reaches back over 4,000 years. Anthony explores hanging coffins, wineries, and a bomb shelter.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: All over the world are forbidden 'triangles' - mysterious regions where ships, planes, and people enter and then just disappear. They are found in Bermuda, Alaska, Japan and elsewhere. But why?

programme.title: Swamp People (S15) - EP 15
programme.desc: With just three days left in the season, a cold front sends gators into hiding. Willie and Little Willie split up for the first time ever to cover more ground, and Little Willie feels the pressure.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Human bones as a 'miracle cure' for gout? Living mummies buried alive? A truly bizarre Victorian way to lose weight—with tapeworms? The stranger side of human nature is revealed in these rituals.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12) - EP 22
programme.desc: New ground-penetrating radar uncovers evidence of more structures in the swamp, and as winter approaches, the team puts a daring plan together to get into the Solution Channel for the first time.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: A lifelong escape artist, Forrest Tucker, ends up in San Quentin prison. But despite his advanced age, he manages to engineer one of the most audacious prison breaks of all time.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13) - EP 10
programme.desc: Lauro continues his quest to complete the Iditarod through the interior of Alaska. Bret and Ivy pursue a bear into dangerously steep terrain. Daniel sets traps for wolves to protect the deer population.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6) - EP 3
programme.desc: A violent assault ends in a fatal stabbing when a young mother kills her boyfriend to defend her child. Considered innocent by police for four years, she was re-arrested and faces up to 41 years in prison.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14) - EP 7
programme.desc: Andy has worked odd jobs his entire adult life, and he considers himself an entrepreneur specialising in the reselling of scrap and junk.

programme.title: Crime In Progress - EP 3
programme.desc: When a respected Cleveland doctor goes missing, a chilling investigation into his fractured family explodes into a 12-hour standoff and a brutal truth that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 8
programme.desc: Police are hard-pressed to find solid leads when a 19-year-old girl vanishes without a trace.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 1
programme.desc: When the body of free-spirited Bonnie Ruphard, 47, is spotted by a runner in Lafayette, LA, police suspect domestic violence.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bad decisions cause people to get booked in, including a first-timer that resisted arrest for riding their bicycle on the wrong side of the road, a couple that had half a pound of meth.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam - EP 15
programme.desc: A shooting suspect begins cutting himself with a pocket knife after investigators leave him alone in the interrogation room; a woman breaks down after telling police that she drowned her grandmother.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam - EP 16
programme.desc: A man breaks down sobbing after admitting to stabbing his mom; an actress tells detectives how and why she shot her estranged uncle; a suspected murderer tries to broker an immunity deal; and more.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 10
programme.desc: When a witness sees a nightclub owner jump to his death from his fifth-floor condo, the case is seemingly open and shut; that is until Dr. Jennifer Nara's autopsy reveals shocking new evidence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks - EP 3
programme.desc: When teens Llianna Adank and Eric Goldstrand are found shot to death at an Oregon park in 1977, every parent's nightmare comes true.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 2
programme.desc: In 1991 Curtis "Cochise" Smith, 29, heads out for diapers in Plaquemine, Louisiana, and vanishes. Twenty-five years later, a body surfaces in the bayou, and Cochise's murder case reignites.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: At the scene of a chilling triple murder in Northern Maine, detectives recover DNA evidence that suggests an out-of-town visitor may be behind the brutal crime.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: After a deceased baby is found hidden in a cardboard box, investigators question the mother and her estranged husband to figure out who is responsible for this horrific crime.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 3
programme.desc: After Nicole’s murder, OJ's behaviour grows increasingly erratic and bizarre. Placed squarely in the LAPD's crosshairs as the prime suspect, he leads them on a slow-speed chase down the 405.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: After rideshare driver Carolina Vargas drove a nice stranger to his hotel, she didn't have qualms about giving him another ride. But her trusting gesture turned tragic.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception - EP 2
programme.desc: Matheau Moore sits down for a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo. Though he was found not guilty of murdering his wife, suspicions still follow him—even among those closest to the case.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception - EP 3
programme.desc: Edward Ates takes a polygraph test with former FBI agent George Olivo in a bid to show his innocence. He spent 20 years behind bars for the murder of his neighbour—a crime he says he didn’t commit.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers (S9) - EP 3
programme.desc: It's a wild Alaska summer day as troopers locate a naked wolf hunter, track a suspected felon through the woods, and respond to an animal hoarder in a remote village just north of the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: A man in Modesto was apprehended by a K9 unit while fleeing from police; another was arrested while his family dog was bleeding in their backyard.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 3
programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel - EP 8
programme.desc: Local police receive a distressing 911 call from 32-year-old Brian Redding. He is heard crying and screaming that he has found his 16-year-old girlfriend dead in their room.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West - EP 1
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Rockies, Carolyn Jansen, 43, is found dead, stuffed into a duct-taped container. Detectives have two suspects but no clear way to tell who is the killer.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 140
programme.desc: An accused sex offender masturbates in virtual court; a defendant begs the judge to let him go home to take care of his dog; a convicted murderer tells the judge to 'hurry up' during sentencing; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 141
programme.desc: A father attacks his son's killer in court; a defendant drops the f-bomb during a virtual hearing; a man convicted of child abuse lashes out at the judge; and more.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Charming and smart, Henry tried to hide his dark side, fuelled by years of abuse and twisted fantasies, until his first murder. Then, bad Henry took over.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Lake of the Ozarks and police must keep a tight rein on folks looking to blow it out during the final weeks of the season as summer winds down.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 3
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: The First 48 (S25) - EP 499
programme.desc: A visit to Mobile ends in tragedy when a violent chain reaction leads to the death of a teenage girl.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 515
programme.desc: Tulsa police find a woman beaten to death during a welfare check, and a son witnesses his father's murder while renovating a house.

programme.title: The Mating Game S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Jungles are home to 80% of all species but they cover just 2% of the planet. When animals in these crowded forests want to mate, the challenge is how to stand out from the crowd.

programme.title: The Great Wall with Ash Dykes S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: In the next phase of Ash Dykes' adventure, he sets out to explore one of the oldest Great Walls at Zhangjiakou, fortified by eight consecutive dynasties. Along the way, there's a brief detour to carve up the fresh powder on the black runs at Chongli. Dykes then immerses himself in the footsteps of centuries-old explorers at Wulouggou before tracing the Great Wall to its intersection with the Yellow River-a symbolic convergence of Chinese history and nature.

programme.title: Solar System S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Professor Brian Cox explores the solar system's frozen worlds. He meets the dwarf planet where mountains of solid ice float across the surface, the black and white moon painted with frost, and a world illuminated by a strange form of ice. In the far reaches of the solar system, ice behaves in unimaginable ways and may have even created habitats for alien life.

programme.title: Michael Portillo's Long Weekends S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: Michael's first day in Lisbon starts with riding the iconic Route 28 tram. Next he savors unique Portuguese cuisine, encounters passionate peacocks, experiences the soul of Fado music, and uncovers the tragic history of the Portuguese monarchy.

programme.title: The Mating Game S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Jungles are home to 80% of all species but they cover just 2% of the planet. When animals in these crowded forests want to mate, the challenge is how to stand out from the crowd.

programme.title: Michael Portillo's Long Weekends S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Michael's Lisbon adventure: He explores the Belem Tower, dines in a lavish 18th-century palace, and discovers a secret Chinese restaurant hidden within the city. He also enjoys local delicacies, from goosefoot barnacles to president-approved pastries.

programme.title: Wild Japan S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: In the far south west of Japan, there is a chain of islands stretching towards the tropics - a place where all life is influenced by the power of the sea, and where volcanoes and typhoons are forces to be reckoned with. The journey begins at an island at the top of the chain and travels south, revealing unexpected stories of isolation, unique wildlife and unsolved mysteries.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles S02 - EP 5
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels from the Alps to the Adriatic in another entertaining railway adventure as he journeys by train through the breath-taking scenery of Slovenia and Croatia.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Today, Earth is a human world, home to eight billion people and counting. Humans now have a greater effect in shaping Earth's surface than many natural processes. Chris Packham explores how dramatic twists in Earth's story enabled humans to go from being part of nature to controlling it and what can be learnt from this epic tale before it's too late.

programme.title: Frozen Planet S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: David Attenborough takes viewers on an extraordinary journey across the polar regions of our planet, North and South. The Arctic and Antarctic are the greatest and least known wildernesses, ice worlds inhabited by the toughest creatures on earth. The sun shines on the North Pole again after six months of darkness. programme.title: Wild Japan S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: In the far south west of Japan, there is a chain of islands stretching towards the tropics - a place where all life is influenced by the power of the sea, and where volcanoes and typhoons are forces to be reckoned with. The journey begins at an island at the top of the chain and travels south, revealing unexpected stories of isolation, unique wildlife and unsolved mysteries.

programme.title: The Great Wall with Ash Dykes S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: In the next phase of Ash Dykes' adventure, he sets out to explore one of the oldest Great Walls at Zhangjiakou, fortified by eight consecutive dynasties. Along the way, there's a brief detour to carve up the fresh powder on the black runs at Chongli. Dykes then immerses himself in the footsteps of centuries-old explorers at Wulouggou before tracing the Great Wall to its intersection with the Yellow River-a symbolic convergence of Chinese history and nature.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles S02 - EP 5
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels from the Alps to the Adriatic in another entertaining railway adventure as he journeys by train through the breath-taking scenery of Slovenia and Croatia.

programme.title: Michael Portillo's Long Weekends S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: Michael's Lisbon adventure: He explores the Belem Tower, dines in a lavish 18th-century palace, and discovers a secret Chinese restaurant hidden within the city. He also enjoys local delicacies, from goosefoot barnacles to president-approved pastries.

programme.title: Wild Japan S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: In the far south west of Japan, there is a chain of islands stretching towards the tropics - a place where all life is influenced by the power of the sea, and where volcanoes and typhoons are forces to be reckoned with. programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Today, Earth is a human world, home to eight billion people and counting. Humans now have a greater effect in shaping Earth's surface than many natural processes. Chris Packham explores how dramatic twists in Earth's story enabled humans to go from being part of nature to controlling it and what can be learnt from this epic tale before it's too late.
